pi_items.source: setup_task.sh line 19 and export_result.sh line 6 define PROJECT_DIR with this path
setup_task.sh line 77 defines docker-compose.yml service named 'web'
setup_task.sh lines 49 (Flask app.run port=5000), 71 (Dockerfile CMD gunicorn bind 0.0.0.0:5000), 80 (docker-compose port mapping 5000:5000); export_result.sh lines 49, 67 (curl to localhost:5000)

privileged_info_summary: The task is a Docker development environment setup for a Flask Quote Service. The project directory is at /home/ga/projects/quote-service, containing a Flask 3.0.0 application. The Docker Compose configuration defines a 'web' service running on port 5000. The application uses Python 3.9-slim as the base image with Gunicorn 21.2.0 for production and Flask development server for hot-reload development. The task requires modifying the docker-compose.yml to add volume mounts for the ./src directory and override the command to enable the Flask debug server for hot-reloading code changes without container restart.
